MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-22-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTON, ANTHONY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL ST, #308, STAYED UNTIL JUN-06-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WILL WAIVE ALL BACK RENTS AND DAMAGES, BUT IF DEFT. DOES NOT COMPLY WITH TERMS PLTF. WILL HAVE A JUDGEMENT FOR A TOTAL OF $556.79; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS).
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
